CONTENT.Club career: Bahoya is a youth product of Foyer Espérance Trélazé, and ES Andard Brain, before moving to the youth academy of Angers in 2014. He was the top scorer for the U17s with Angers, with 30 goals in 25 matches. On 16 May 2022, he signed his first professional contract with Angers until 2025. He was called up to their senior team for the first time in August 2022. He made his professional and senior debut with Angers in a 0–0 (5–4) penalty shootout win over Strasbourg on 6 January 2023.On 25 January 2024, Bahoya signed a 5.5-year contract with Eintracht Frankfurt in Germany.
CONTENT.External links: Jean-Mattéo Bahoya at SoccerwayFFF profileLigue 1 profile
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Bahoya holds French and Cameroonian nationalities. He is a youth international for France, having played for the France U18s in November 2022.

SUMMARY: Jean-Mattéo Bahoya Négoce (born 7 May 2005) is a French professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for German Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt.
